creator: mr.vladis@gmail.com
text:
We are using FreeBSD as GateWay with PF.
And the problem is that some web-sites as Gmail.com or Msn.com are unavailable from machines with Vista or Server 2008 installed.
If use external or internal proxy (Kerio WinRoute, wich also goes through the same FreeBSD gw) they are opening correctly. 
Also in 6.1 version were problems with skype from such machines.
